hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = $OutputEncoding; $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null; if (-not $root) { $root = (Get-Location).Path }; python3 (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\skill_gate.py')"
